claim: Project H local Verilator RTL reference correlation
region_scope: local banked memory controller measurement region
metric_scope: counts latency throughput and Project H bank_conflict_ratio_pct

error_budget: exact counts tiny latency tolerance and throughput relative error <= 0.1 percent
valid_wording: Project H provides a bounded local RTL reference path for the banked memory controller micro-model when generated correlation results are available.
invalid_wording: A bounded local RTL comparison proves full-system cycle accuracy.
limitation: Source flow exists but generated results may be not_generated in a clean checkout and the claim is bounded to one local micro-model.
next_step: Run Project H in a Verilator-capable environment and preserve generated correlation outputs.
